question: Jaké jsou celkové internetové náklady na produkty?
mdx_query: SELECT {[Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaké procento internetových tržeb tvoří internetová částka daně?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Internet Tax Percent] AS IIF([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Internet Tax Amount] / [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Internet Tax Percent]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaká je celková výše tržeb resellerů?
mdx_query: SELECT {[Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaký je hrubý zisk resellerů (tržby resellerů minus celkové náklady resellerů na produkty)?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Reseller Gross Profit] AS [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Reseller Total Product Cost] SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Reseller Gross Profit]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaká je kombinovaná výše tržeb (internet + reseller)?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Combined Sales Amount] AS [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] + [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount] SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Combined Sales Amount]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaký je kombinovaný hrubý zisk (internet + reseller)?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Internet Gross Profit] AS [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost] MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Reseller Gross Profit] AS [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Reseller Total Product Cost] MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Profit] AS [Measures].[Calc Internet Gross Profit] + [Measures].[Calc Reseller Gross Profit] SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Profit]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaká je celková hrubá marže při použití kombinovaných internetových tržeb a tržeb resellerů?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Profit] AS ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]) + ([Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Reseller Total Product Cost]) MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Margin] AS IIF(([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] + [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount]) = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Profit] / ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] + [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount])) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Margin]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaký je poměr počtu internetových objednávek k počtu zákazníků?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Orders Per Customer] AS IIF([Measures].[Customer Count] = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Internet Order Count] / [Measures].[Customer Count]) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Orders Per Customer]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]
